entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where food security challenges are analyzed

entities.name: FOOD SECURITY
entities.description: The goal of ensuring availability, affordability, quality, and safety of food

entities.name: AVAILABILITY
entities.description: An aspect of food security referring to the presence of food

entities.name: AFFORDABILITY
entities.description: An aspect of food security referring to the economic access to food

entities.name: QUALITY AND SAFETY
entities.description: An aspect of food security referring to the nutritional value and safety of food

entities.name: AGRICULTURE
entities.description: The sector involving crop production and farming

entities.name: GROSS DOMESTIC PRODUCT
entities.description: The total economic output of the country

entities.name: FARM DISTRESS
entities.description: The state of economic hardship among farmers

entities.name: FIELD YIELDS
entities.description: The actual amount of crop harvested per unit area

entities.name: PHYSICAL INFRASTRUCTURE
entities.description: The basic physical systems needed for agricultural operations

entities.name: VALUE CHAINS
entities.description: The sequence of processes involved in the production and distribution of agricultural products

entities.name: GOOD AGRICULTURAL MANAGEMENT PRACTICES
entities.description: Standardized farming techniques for better management

entities.name: PRODUCTIVITY LEVELS
entities.description: The measure of agricultural output efficiency
